name: karma-test-explorer
description: Run Karma Tests from the Visual Studio Code Test panel
author: Lucas Ononiwu

scripts.rebuild: npm run clean && npm run build

karmaTestExplorer.projectRootPath.description: The working directory where the project is located (relative to the root folder)

karmaTestExplorer.karmaConfFilePath.description: The path where the karma.conf.js is located (absolute path or relative to `projectRootPath`)

karmaTestExplorer.testGrouping.description: How grouping used for displaying tests in the test explorer pane

karmaTestExplorer.karmaProcessExecutable.description: The path to a custom Karma executable or command for launching Karma

karmaTestExplorer.karmaPort.description: The port to be used for the Karma server

karmaTestExplorer.testFiles.description: The path glob patterns identifying the test files (absolute paths or relative to `projectRootPath`)

karmaTestExplorer.excludeFiles.description: The path glob patterns identifying files to be excluded from `testFiles` (absolute paths or relative to `projectRootPath`)

karmaTestExplorer.reloadWatchedFiles.description: The files which when modified will trigger a Karma reload

karmaTestExplorer.reloadOnKarmaConfigura.description: Enables reloading of Karma on changes to the Karma configuration file

karmaTestExplorer.debugLevelLoggingEnabl.description: Enables detailed logging in the output channel that is helpful for troubleshooting issues with running Karma or the extension

karmaTestExplorer.autoWatchEnabled.description: Enables automatic re-run of tests when the files change

karmaTestExplorer.autoWatchBatchDelay.description: The delay in milliseconds when autoWatch is enabled for batching multiple file changes into a single rerun. This is the same as - and overrides - Karma config's `autoWatchBatchDelay` option

karmaTestExplorer.flattenSingleChildFold.description: Flattens paths consisting of single child folders

karmaTestExplorer.defaultSocketConnectio.description: This is the port that will be used to connect Karma with the test explorer

karmaTestExplorer.debuggerConfig.description: Specify the debugger configuration for vscode chrome debugger as you would do in vscode with a json object

karmaTestExplorer.browser.description: The browser that will be launched by Karma for testing. This can also include any valid custom launcher defined in the Karma config file. This takes precedence over the `customLauncher` setting

karmaTestExplorer.customLauncher.description: Specify the karma custom launcher configuration for launching the test browser, similar to a custom launcher entry in a karma config file

karmaTestExplorer.env.description: Additional environment variables to be set when running the tests. These take precedence over those from the `envFile` setting

karmaTestExplorer.envFile.description: Path to environment file containing environment variables to be set when running the tests

karmaTestExplorer.logpanel.description: Enables logging to the output channel

karmaTestExplorer.logfile.description: Enables logging to the specified file
